    Multi-Arm Robotic System (MARS)

    Development Technical Blog

    Learn More

    Welcome to the Build

    This blog documents the development of a MARS (Multi-Arm Robotic System) framework using ROS 2. Our goal is to enable multiple robotic arms to collaborate on complex tasks in a shared environment.

    Over 12 weeks, we're building:

    Simulation Environment

    Gazebo and MuJoCo simulations for testing and development.

    Algorithm Development

    Evaluation of various algorithms for multi-arm coordination and task execution.

    Real-World Deployment

    Deployment onto Niryo Ned2 robotic arms for testing and validation.

    Follow along for updates.
